title: Pumpkin Pie Is Hard to Say
overview: The story takes place in an ordinary town where it is natural for everyone to wear an animal costume head. It depicts the everyday life of the main character MILPOM and her friends who live there, filled with the essence of Kawaii and a little bit cynical girls.

title: What Kind of Bird Is a Turkey Anyway?!
overview: When Christmas is fast approaching, MILPOM and her friends visit the nail salon that HAPPY recommends. They wait for their turn too long and an unexpected happening occurs!

title: The Person You Fall for Is Your Type. Isn't That an Urban Legend?
overview: SILKY, CACAO, and HAPPY visit the café where MILPOM works part-time. They chat about their ideal type of men, which turns into a crazy girl talk!

title: Isn't It A Reality That You'll Be Likened to a Smartmouthed Adolescent if You Speak of Your Dreams and That You'll Be Shunned for Being Snobbish if You Talk About Your Future?
overview: MILPOM, SILKY, CACAO and HAPPY unveil their ambitions, one-by-one, as they’re interviewed on the street in Harajuku...!

title: Doesn't Simply Watching Cooking Videos Make You Feel Like You're a Master Chef?
overview: The foursome of MILPOM, SILKY, CACAO and HAPPY challenge to make a character-themed lunch as it's so popular today. Their kyara-ben, be delicious!

title: When You Start to Wonder About Your Roots, Is Thinking 24/7 Ever Enough?
